summary: W888 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while replacing the W887 bundled normalized fixed-target data provider with three explicit fields. The assembled W719 provider feeds W887, then W886, W885, W884, W883, W882, W881, W880, and W879. Product success remains false because the explicit W888 fields, the remaining concrete leaves, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W888 exposes the W719 normalized fixed-target provider as three explicit fields, but those fields and the other W888 concrete leaves are still not instantiated.

The remaining W888 fields are boundary data, relation data, target surjectivity and compactness, matched selected-difference and mapped-cokernel closedness branch data, normalized lift blueprint, two fixed-target uniqueness obligations, a Pretriangulated structure on BoundedComplexCategory MetrizableLCA, an IsTriangulated structure on that source, source-side triangle-completion data, forgetful homology preservation, endpoint closed-embedding facts, endpoint open-map facts, endpoint ExactAt epi facts, the bounded homotopy localized right adjoint, its adjunction, and unit membership.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete values for the seventeen W888 explicit field inputs.
Continue splitting or discharging the remaining bundled providers only when the split is supported by current Lean definitions and provider-search evidence.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
